info.name: HubSpot CRM Contacts API
info.description:
Contact records store information about individuals. The contacts endpoints allow you to manage contact data and sync it between HubSpot and other systems. You can create, retrieve, update, and delete contacts, as well as manage associations between contacts and other CRM objects.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support

variable.description: (Required) The type of the object to associate with.
(Required) The ID of the object to associate with.
(Required) The type of association to create.

request.description: Creates an association between a contact and another CRM object record. The association type specifies the relationship between the objects.

response.name: Association created successfully.

(Required) The ID of the associated object.
(Required) The type of association to delete.

request.description: Removes an association between a contact and another CRM object record. This does not delete the contact or the associated object, only the relationship between them.

response.name: Association deleted successfully.

request.description: Returns all associations of a contact record to objects of a specified type, such as companies, deals, or tickets.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the contact to archive.

request.description: Archives (soft deletes) a contact record by its ID. Archived contacts can be restored using the HubSpot UI or API. This does not permanently delete the contact from HubSpot.

response.name: Contact archived successfully.
